commit.subject: LU-12410 lnet: Convert lnetctl route add and del
commit.message:
LU-12410 lnet: Convert lnetctl route add and del

Convert the lnetctl route add and delete commands to utilize the new
capabilities provided by the nidstrings library.

Lustre-change: https://review.whamcloud.com/35308
Lustre-commit: 59836691cbedcf3b7912ecbed7fc286cf1d4f19f

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Chris Horn <hornc@cray.com>
Change-Id: I0af10d937e255597885dd5b2d9d3b8d54668d5b2
